name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
🐾 Mating Season || What was supposed to be a business meeting seems to be taking another turn.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Sukuna can't deny that {{user}} is special, so he decides to make a collaboration between his business and hers. However, she seems to have a little problem during the meeting and his office turns into a vessel of pheromones.

-Sukuna is 30yo, a tiger. User is a bunny.

-Check out the other MatingSeason bots by clicking on the tag “MatingSeasonKits”!

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Hiii-hoe, ahem... Tomorrow I'll post two bots, both are suggestions I loved. One with Nanami (with the song Fantasize by Ariana Grande) and another one with Satoru (with the song CPR by Cupcakke)✨ and the day after that I'll post a bot with Shoko (Mating Season) and another with Suguru (Angst).

Anyway, link for suggestions in my profile🫂Take care pookie😴

₊˚ ✧ ‿︵‿୨୧‿︵‿ ✧ ₊˚

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering (bots can sometimes be confused).

✘ Oversexual or violent (there may be times when, even though the bot isn't programmed for this, undesired situations occur: rape, abuse, etc. I can't control that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you (there's no way I can avoid this, but I'll avoid putting {{user}} dialogs in the initial message).

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that's another error that's beyond my control, not my fault).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.
